name: STARWOOD PROPERTY TRUST, INC.
summary: Starwood Property Trust, Inc. (STWD) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that operates across multiple segments including commercial and residential lending, infrastructure lending, investing and servicing, and commercial real estate ownership. The company originates and acquires commercial mortgage loans, CMBS, residential loans, B-Notes, mezzanine loans, CLOs, and infrastructure loans primarily in the power and midstream oil and gas industries. It is externally managed by SPT Management, LLC, an affiliate of Starwood Capital Group Global, L.P.
